---
title: "Graduate Supervison"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
---

#### Ph.D Candidate

+ Haotian Mi, 2023 - present

+ Jiahao Zhao, 2023 - present

+ Yiliang Zhou, 2023 - present


#### M.Sc. Candidate

+ Chenxia Liu, Msc Financial Mathematics, 2022 - present

+ Pengyun Zhao, Msc Actuarial Science, 2022 - present

+ Lan Wu, Msc Actuarial Science, 2022 - present

#### Past Students

+ Zhelin Wang, Msc Actuarial Science, 2021 - 2022
